headline: Citigroup and J&J Snack have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Citigroup's strong Q2 results, rising earnings estimates and low valuation fuel its Bull of the Day status, while JJSF faces weaker outlook.

raw.headline: Citigroup and J&J Snack have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day

headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks with Warning Signs
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

raw.headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks with Warning Signs
raw.summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Veralto, Raises Price Target to $111
summary: Stifel  analyst Nathan Jones   maintains Veralto (NYSE:VLTO) with a Buy and raises the price target from $110 to $111.
